query: ok so I need to migrate our monolith to microservices but honestly I have no idea where to even start. there's like 200k lines of code and 40 engineers touching it daily. help me plan this out?
break this down for me - I want to add real-time notifications to our app. we're using Next.js and Supabase, and I'm thinking SSE or websockets but not sure which. what should I do first?
I keep starting projects and then realizing halfway through that I missed something critical. can you help me plan building a chrome extension that auto-fills forms from our CRM?
plan this: we need to switch from Stripe to a custom billing system because Stripe's fees are killing us. ~5000 active subscriptions, 3 pricing tiers, annual and monthly billing
I'm overwhelmed. I need to set up CI/CD for our team's 12 repos, add testing, linting, and deploy to AWS. where do I even begin? what's the first thing I should tackle?
help me think through refactoring our data pipeline. it's a mess of cron jobs and bash scripts that ETL data from 5 different sources into postgres. breaks every other week
I want to checkpoint plan migrating our iOS app from UIKit to SwiftUI. we have 80 screens and can't stop shipping features during the migration
make a plan for implementing SSO across our 3 internal tools. we're using Auth0 but each tool has its own user table and session management right now
so my team just got told we need to be SOC2 compliant by Q3. I've never done compliance before. planning this feels impossible, there's so many unknowns
I've been procrastinating on redesigning our API because the scope keeps growing in my head. can you help me break it down into something I can actually start on?
write a python script that reads a CSV file and outputs a summary of each column's statistics including mean, median, and standard deviation
can you review this PR? it changes the auth middleware to support API keys in addition to JWT tokens. here's the diff: ...

fix the bug in my React component - the useEffect is causing an infinite re-render loop. here's the code: const [data, setData] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('/api').then(r => setData(r)) }, [data])
write a PRD for our new dashboard feature. it should include success metrics, user stories, and technical requirements
explain the difference between Server Components and Client Components in Next.js App Router. when should I use each?
create a Mermaid diagram showing the screen transitions for our onboarding flow: splash -> login -> profile setup -> tutorial -> home
I need to create a data model for our e-commerce app. we have products, orders, customers, and inventory. can you design the ER diagram?
deploy this to production. run the tests first, then build the docker image, push to ECR, and update the ECS service
refactor this function to use async/await instead of callbacks. here's the current code: function getData(cb) { db.query('SELECT * FROM users', (err, rows) => { cb(err, rows) }) }
optimize this postgres query, it's taking 12 seconds: SELECT * FROM orders JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id WHERE orders.created_at > '2025-01-01' ORDER BY total DESC
